creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
running portupgrade via cron output too many noises.

Fix: 

files/patch-lib-pkgtools.rb in sysutils/portupgrade is not necessary.
	I do not know whether any other problem may happen without this patch,
	but for many years this program works quite well with no noisy message.
	If this causes another problem, add knob to run quietly.
How-To-Repeat: 	run "portupgrade -aFO" via cron.
	output messages are like this:
	--->  Fetching the distfile(s) for 'openldap-client-2.3.25' (net/openldap23-client)
	--->  Fetching '/usr/ports/net/openldap23-client'

	=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.OpenLDAP.org/pub/OpenLDAP/openldap-release/.
